title: lastrea sparsa var. zeylanica
intro: Lastrea sparsa var. zeylanica, also known as a fern species, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, the medicinal properties of Lastrea sparsa var. zeylanica have been valued for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. In terms of herbal preparations, Lastrea sparsa var. zeylanica is often used in traditional medicine, where it is prepared in the form of infusions, decoctions, or dried and powdered for its medicinal properties.
